THE_ARCHITECT.talk.NINJAMOD-NINJA.0-0r.a: A shadow slips through my halls, unseen and unheard. How quaint.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.NINJAMOD-NINJA.1-0r.a: You climb in silence, little ninja. The Spire devours the voiceless all the same.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.NINJAMOD-NINJA.1-1r.c: A blade answers where words will not.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.NINJAMOD-NINJA.2-0r.a: Steel and smoke. You cannot cut what has no form, what raised this very Spire.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.NINJAMOD-NINJA.2-1r.c: Then I will unmake it, brick by brick.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.NINJAMOD-NINJA.3-0r.a: Return to the dark from whence you came, shadow. The Architect endures.
